CLASSIFIER_CYCLE_IN_PROGRESS: Wait for the classifier cycle to finish
RECONCILE_IN_PROGRESS: Wait for the reconciliation to finish
CLASSIFIER_CHAMPION_REPORT_PROTECTED: Cannot delete the active champion report
BENCHMARK_MODES_EMPTY: At least one mode must be enabled
CLASSIFIER_DATASETS_NOT_READY: Classifier datasets are not ready yet
VALIDATION_EMPTY: The validation set has no labeled documents. Approve or correct documents in triage — starting with the 2nd decision, one automatically joins the validation set.
INBOX_FILE_NOT_FOUND: File not found in the inbox: {{filename}}
FILE_NOT_FOUND_ON_FILESYSTEM: File not found on the filesystem: {{path}}
CATALOG_URL_REQUIRES_DRY_RUN: An alternative URL is only accepted with dry_run=true — save it first
CATALOG_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to fetch the remote catalog: {{error}}
OPENAI_KEY_HEADER_REQUIRED: Provide the OpenAI key in the X-OpenAI-API-Key header
ANTHROPIC_KEY_HEADER_REQUIRED: Provide the Anthropic key in the X-Anthropic-API-Key header
OPENAI_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: Configure the OpenAI key before validating
ANTHROPIC_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: Configure the Anthropic key before validating
LLM_API_KEY_MISSING_OR_INVALID: Provider API key not configured or invalid. Set OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the backend (or provide it in the assistant settings).
TRIAGE_REJECTED_ORPHAN: Record has no physical file (orphan) — use delete to clean up the record
TRIAGE_DECISION_IN_PROGRESS: A decision is already in progress for this document
TRIAGE_ALREADY_DECIDED: This document has already been decided
TRIAGE_ACTION_INVALID: Invalid action. Use approve, correct or reject.
TRIAGE_BUSINESS_DOMAIN_UNDEFINED: Target business_domain not defined for approval/correction
TRIAGE_DOCUMENT_TYPE_UNDEFINED: Target document_type not defined for approval/correction
LAYOUT_PLAN_ID_STALE: plan_id is invalid for the current project state
validation_empty: The validation set has no labeled documents. Approve or correct documents in triage — starting with the 2nd decision, one automatically joins the validation set.
auto_backfill_on_run: When the cycle runs, {{would_move}} training document(s) will be automatically reserved for validation.
sparse_gate_not_met: The sparse benchmark will be skipped: 100 training documents are required (there are {{records}}).
LLM_MODEL_NEEDS_RESPONSES_API: This model requires the Responses API for tools+reasoning. Refresh the model catalog (Assistant settings → Catalog → Refresh) and try again.
MOONSHOT_KEY_HEADER_REQUIRED: Provide the Moonshot key in the X-Moonshot-API-Key header
MOONSHOT_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: Configure the Moonshot key before validating
OLLAMA_REQUEST_FAILED: Failed to reach Ollama — is it running? (ollama serve)
PROJECTS_ROOT_UNAVAILABLE: Projects folder unavailable — recreate the folder on the host and restart the stack (docker compose down && docker compose up -d).

api.loadCycleStatus: Failed to load classifier cycle status
api.refreshModelCatalog: Failed to refresh the model catalog
api.loadCatalogConfig: Failed to load the catalog configuration
api.saveCatalogUrl: Failed to save the catalog URL
api.loadCatalogDetail: Failed to load the detailed catalog
api.addTaxonomyAliases: Failed to add aliases to the taxonomy
